citation_tightness.note: All factual claims are directly supported by adjacent citations [1]-[14], with no uncited assertions.

completeness.note: Major evidence rows (primary trials [9], regulatory status [6], safety [1][2]) are addressed, with completeness checklist confirming 6/6 topics covered.

flow.note: Logical progression from regulatory framework (context) → mechanism → limitations, with clear section transitions.

hedging_appropriateness.note: Prose uses cautious language (e.g., 'intended to ensure', 'noted to benefit') where evidence shows uncertainty, avoiding overconfidence.

tone_consistency.note: Tone remains neutral and evidence-grounded throughout, with no promotional or biased language.
